studies.title: A randomized, controlled intervention study to evaluate a digital psychological intervention (DiGA) in terms of improvements in mental health, quality of life, and pain in patients with rheumatic diseases

_verification.reason: The study specifically evaluates the digital psychological intervention 'HelloBetter Stress und Burnout' as mentioned in the trial description and scientific summary. The product name appears multiple times in the full text, confirming the study's focus on this specific digital therapeutic product.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a 'randomized, controlled intervention study' where participants are randomly assigned to either an intervention group using a digital psychological intervention or a control group receiving standard treatment. This randomization and control of conditions are defining features of an RCT.
